hero.headline: Vignan Online MBA in Human Resource Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved online MBA with HRM specialisation from Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Guntur. NAAC A+, NIRF #70 University 2025, Deemed University. Rs 90,000 total fee across 4 semesters. Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month. Sem 3-4 covers Talent Acquisition and Management, Industrial Relations and Labour Laws, Performance Management, HR Metrics and Analytics, and Strategic HRM.

sections.tldr: Vignan Online MBA Human Resource Management: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, NIRF #70 University 2025. Rs 90,000 total fee (4 semesters). Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through Vignan. Sem 3-4 covers Talent Acquisition, Industrial Relations and Labour Laws, Performance Management, Organizational Development and Change Management, HR Metrics and Analytics, and Strategic HRM. Among the cheapest NAAC A+ online HRM MBAs in India.

about.body:
The Vignan Online MBA in Human Resource Management is offered by Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research (VFSTR), a Deemed University established in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. VFSTR holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. NIRF ranks it #70 among universities in 2025.

The HRM specialisation covers Talent Acquisition and Management, Industrial Relations and Labour Laws, Performance Management, Organizational Development and Change Management, HR Metrics and Analytics, Leadership in Practice, and Strategic HRM across Semesters 3 and 4. The syllabus balances traditional HR (IR, labour laws) with modern HR analytics and strategic workforce planning.

At Rs 90,000 total, Vignan Online is among the cheapest UGC-DEB approved online MBAs with an HRM specialisation. The trade-off is limited brand recognition outside Andhra Pradesh and South India. For HR professionals who need the MBA credential at minimum cost for internal promotions or mid-career transitions, Vignan HRM is a practical option.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Environment and Strategy
sem3Subjects.description: Study the external business environment, strategic analysis frameworks, and formulation of competitive strategies.

sem3Subjects.name: Talent Acquisition and Management
sem3Subjects.description: Cover recruitment planning, sourcing strategies, selection methods, employer branding, and onboarding processes.

sem3Subjects.name: Industrial Relations and Labour Laws
sem3Subjects.description: Study Indian labour legislation, trade union dynamics, collective bargaining, dispute resolution, and compliance requirements.

sem3Subjects.name: Performance Management
sem3Subjects.description: Design performance appraisal systems, set KPIs, conduct calibration sessions, and link performance to compensation and development.

sem3Subjects.name: Research-Based Learning-I
sem3Subjects.description: Conduct structured research on an HR topic using academic methodology, data collection, and analysis.

sem4Subjects.name: Entrepreneurship Development
sem4Subjects.description: Study business model creation, startup finance, venture capital, and entrepreneurial risk assessment.

sem4Subjects.name: Organizational Development and Change Management
sem4Subjects.description: Study OD interventions, change readiness assessment, resistance management, and culture transformation frameworks.

sem4Subjects.name: HR Metrics and Analytics
sem4Subjects.description: Apply data analytics to workforce planning, attrition prediction, engagement measurement, and HR dashboard design.

sem4Subjects.name: Leadership in Practice
sem4Subjects.description: Study leadership styles, executive coaching models, team dynamics, and practical leadership decision-making frameworks.

sem4Subjects.name: Strategic HRM
sem4Subjects.description: Align HR strategy with business objectives, design workforce plans, manage talent pipelines, and build HR as a strategic function.

sem4Subjects.name: Research-Based Learning-II
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied HR research project with data analysis, findings presentation, and actionable recommendations.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 cover shared core subjects across all Vignan Online MBA specialisations. See the main Vignan Online MBA page for the core subject list. Syllabus applies to the 2025-26 admission cycle. Reconfirm current syllabus with our counsellor before enrolment.

whoHires.body:
HRM MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** IT and IT services, Manufacturing, Banking and financial services, Pharma, FMCG, Consulting, BPO/KPO

**Entry-level roles:** HR Executive, Talent Acquisition Associate, HR Generalist, Payroll Executive, Employee Engagement Coordinator

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** HR Manager, Talent Acquisition Manager, HR Business Partner, Compensation and Benefits Manager, Learning and Development Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Human Resources, CHRO, Head of Talent, Director of HR Operations, Head of People Analytics

**Typical hiring organisations:** TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL Tech, Cognizant, Deloitte, KPMG, Hindustan Unilever, Reliance Industries, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, Larsen and Toubro

skills.body:
The HRM specialisation builds skills tested by IT, manufacturing, and services organisations:

**Technical skills:**
- Talent Acquisition: recruitment funnel design, ATS configuration, sourcing channel ROI analysis, and competency-based interview design
- Industrial Relations and Labour Laws: compliance with Factories Act, Industrial Disputes Act, Shops and Establishments Act, and new Labour Codes
- Performance Management: balanced scorecard design, 360-degree feedback implementation, and performance-linked incentive modelling
- HR Metrics and Analytics: attrition prediction models, engagement survey design, workforce cost analysis, and HR dashboard creation

**Applied skills:**
- OD and Change Management: culture audit execution, change communication planning, and stakeholder alignment for transformation initiatives
- Strategic HRM: workforce planning models, succession planning, and HR strategy alignment with business growth plans

**Soft skills:** Conflict resolution, grievance handling, negotiation with trade unions, executive coaching conversations, and cross-functional stakeholder management.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Vignan Online MBA HRM against peers:

**vs Uttaranchal Online MBA HR (Rs 94,000):** Uttaranchal is Rs 4,000 more with NAAC A+. Both are in the sub-Rs 1 lakh category. Vignan includes HR Metrics and Analytics and Strategic HRM as dedicated subjects, adding modern HR coverage. Uttaranchal covers HRM Planning and Bargaining and Negotiation Process.

**vs Galgotias Online MBA HR (Rs 86,400):** Galgotias is Rs 3,600 cheaper with NAAC A+ but no NIRF university rank. Vignan (NIRF #70) adds the ranking credential. Both are budget HR MBAs.

**vs Sharda Online MBA HRM (Rs 1,54,500):** Sharda is 1.7x the cost with NAAC A+ and stronger Delhi NCR brand. For HR roles at MNCs in the NCR region, Sharda carries more weight. Vignan delivers similar accreditation at Rs 64,500 less.

At Rs 90,000, Vignan is the cheapest NAAC A+ online MBA with a dedicated HRM track and NIRF ranking in this batch. The limitation is brand recognition outside Andhra Pradesh.

fees.body:
The Vignan Online MBA in Human Resource Management is priced at Rs 90,000 total program fee across 4 semesters (2-year programme). This makes Vignan Online among the most affordable UGC-DEB approved online MBAs in India.

**Zero-cost EMI**: Available directly through Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research starting Rs 5,700 per month. No external marketing partner or NBFC intermediary involved.

**Additional charges**: Registration, application, examination, and project fees are not separately documented on Vignan Online's portal. Please reconfirm all charges with our counsellor before enrolment.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Vignan Online each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees and all applicable charges with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Guntur. It reads 'Master of Business Administration' with the Human Resource Management specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Vignan Online MBA HRM students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Lakshmi
items.liked: Rs 90,000 for a NAAC A+ online MBA in HRM is the best value I found. No-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month made it truly affordable.
items.disliked: Recorded lecture quality for some HR subjects could improve. Audio was inconsistent in a few sessions.
items.body: I work as an HR generalist at a mid-size IT company in Vijayawada. The Talent Acquisition and Performance Management subjects directly improved my on-the-job skills. The HR Metrics and Analytics subject gave me frameworks for building the HR dashboard my manager had been asking for. At Rs 90,000, the ROI was clear within the first year.

items.name: Venkat
items.liked: Industrial Relations and Labour Laws subject was thorough and practically useful for compliance work.
items.disliked: Vignan brand recognition in Bangalore IT corridors is weak. HR manager roles at top IT companies require a more recognised MBA brand. My Infosys colleagues had MBAs from Manipal or Symbiosis.
items.body: If you already work in HR at a smaller company or in Andhra Pradesh, Vignan is fine. But for competitive HR roles at top-tier IT companies in Bangalore, Hyderabad, or Chennai, the brand does not open doors. I used it for an internal promotion, which worked. For external job switches to brand-name employers, invest more in a nationally recognised programme.

items.name: Divya
items.liked: Strategic HRM and OD subjects in Sem 4 gave a big-picture perspective on building HR as a strategic function. Exam process was smooth.
items.disliked: No dedicated placement support for online MBA students. Career services are limited to the on-campus batch.
items.body: The HRM syllabus is solid for the price. Six dedicated HR subjects across Sem 3-4 is more depth than some programmes costing twice as much. The research-based learning projects pushed me to apply concepts to real workplace problems. Good programme for working HR professionals in South India who want credentials without breaking the bank.

faqs.question: Is Rs 90,000 the total Vignan Online MBA fee?
faqs.answer: Yes. Rs 90,000 is the total programme fee spread across 4 semesters. Reconfirm any additional charges for registration, examination, or project with our counsellor before enrolment.

faqs.question: Does Vignan offer zero-cost EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes. Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research offers zero-cost EMI directly at Rs 5,700 per month. No external NBFC or marketing partner is involved.

faqs.question: What is Vignan's NAAC grade?
faqs.answer: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research holds NAAC A+ accreditation. Verify the current status at naac.gov.in.

faqs.question: Does the HRM specialisation cover HR analytics?
faqs.answer: Yes. HR Metrics and Analytics is a dedicated Sem 4 subject covering attrition prediction, engagement measurement, workforce cost analysis, and HR dashboard design.

faqs.question: How does Vignan HRM compare to Sharda HRM on fees?
faqs.answer: Vignan HRM costs Rs 90,000 total. Sharda HRM costs approximately Rs 1,54,500. Vignan is Rs 64,500 cheaper but Sharda offers stronger brand recognition in Delhi NCR and North India.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved online MBA in HRM at Rs 90,000 total fee.
You work in HR and need the MBA credential for promotion or role transition at your current organisation.
You want zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through the university with no NBFC intermediary.
consider: If brand recognition at top IT companies or MNC HR teams matters, Sharda (Rs 1,54,500, NAAC A+) or a higher-ranked university carries more weight.
If you want a similarly priced alternative, Galgotias (Rs 86,400, NAAC A+) is Rs 3,600 cheaper.
If you want modern HR analytics depth with stronger industry partnerships, consider programmes from NIRF top-50 universities at a higher fee point.
